_comment: 简单图片生成模板 - 单张图片
_usage: 适用于快速生成单张图片，无需分镜或多视图
_expected_output: 单张高质量图片，可用于海报、封面、概念图等
image_description: 赛博朋克风格的未来城市，霓虹灯光，雨夜氛围

prompt.main: cyberpunk city at night, neon lights reflecting on wet streets, flying cars, towering skyscrapers, rain, cinematic composition
prompt.lighting: neon lights, volumetric lighting, dramatic shadows

negative_prompt: low quality, blurry, distorted, ugly, bad anatomy, watermark, text

image_generation._note: seed 为 null 时随机生成，设置固定值可复现结果

post_processing._note: 可选的后处理步骤，需要额外工具支持

variations._note: 生成多个变体，使用不同 seed

examples._example_1: 人物肖像：portrait of a warrior princess, fantasy art, detailed armor, dramatic lighting
examples._example_2: 自然风景：mountain landscape at sunset, dramatic clouds, golden hour, photorealistic
examples._example_3: 产品设计：futuristic smartphone concept, sleek design, holographic display, product photography
examples._example_4: 抽象艺术：abstract digital art, flowing colors, geometric shapes, modern art style
